scripts.test:ui-old: echo '🧪 Running UI tests with browser access...' && clojure -M -e '(load-file "scripts/run-ui-tests.clj")'
scripts.validate: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.clean: npm run clean:shadow && npm run clean:npm && npm run clean:install
scripts.clean:shadow: npx shadow-cljs stop && rm -rf .shadow-cljs out target .cljs_node_repl
scripts.dev-unified: echo '🚀 Starting unified development environment...' && npm run check-env && npm run dev
scripts.init-agent: echo '🤖 Initializing agent development environment...' && clojure -e '(do (require (quote [dev-unified :as dev])) (dev/init!) (println "🎯 Agent environment ready!"))'
